exercises.title: Your first Q# expression
exercises.description: Implement the forty_two() function so it returns 42.
hints: The function just needs to return a value equal to the integer 42.
The simplest answer is to return the literal `42` itself.
exercises.solutionExplanation: Any Q# expression that evaluates to the integer 42 works. The simplest options are the literal `42` or an arithmetic expression like `40 + 2`.
